_meta.first_load_js_routes: Per-route First Load JS in KB; +10% over baseline triggers CI failure (T13.87).
_meta.regen_command: cd frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:8000 npm run build, then copy the printed table into this file.
_meta.notes: Regenerated post sprint/gowork-facelift souji-sweep. The +10-15% across non-home routes vs the 2026-04-25 capture is the accepted cost of the GSAP+ChapterRail+SiteHeader+SiteFooter chain landing in the shared chunk. The home route ITSELF improved (161 -> 153 kB) thanks to next/dynamic chapter lazy-loading. New routes added by W5+facelift: /accessibility, /api/og/[chapter], /api/og/default, /archive, /dev/tokens.
